user.title: Set up Duplicati Monitor
user.description: Choose a name and a webhook id. The webhook id becomes part of the URL Duplicati will send reports to - pick something short and recognisable (e.g. your Home Assistant instance name), or keep the suggestion. It must be unique among your Duplicati Monitor collectors.

confirm.title: Your webhook URL
confirm.description:
Use this URL in Duplicati's `--send-http-json-urls` option (as a server-wide default option, so it applies to every job automatically), with `?server_id=your-machine-name` appended:

`{webhook_url}`

You can always find this again later on the integration's "Webhook" sensor.

reconfigure.title: Rename Duplicati Monitor
reconfigure.description:
Your webhook URL stays the same:

`{webhook_url}`

error.invalid_webhook_id: Enter a webhook id (letters, numbers, hyphens).
error.webhook_id_taken: That webhook id is already used by another Duplicati Monitor collector.
